mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_review_case ( review_case_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, evidence_set_snapshot_id, snapshot_content_digest, scope_type, origin, policy_version, status, created_by, created_at, decided_at, source_review_case_id, external_submission_ref, callback_batch_ref, mapping_version_id, reopened_from_review_case_id, reopen_trigger_ref) VALUES ( CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{evidenceSetSnapshotId} AS uuid), #{snapshotContentDigest}, #{scopeType}, #{origin}, #{policyVersion}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{decidedAt}, CAST(#{sourceReviewCaseId} AS uuid), #{externalSubmissionRef}, #{callbackBatchRef}, #{mappingVersionId}, CAST(#{reopenedFromReviewCaseId} AS uuid), #{reopenTriggerRef})

INSERT INTO evd_review_decision ( review_decision_id, tenant_id, project_id, review_case_id, decision_ordinal, decision, decision_source, reason_codes, note, approval_ref, decided_by, decided_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{reviewDecisionId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid), #{decisionOrdinal}, #{decision}, #{decisionSource}, CAST(#{reasonCodes} AS jsonb), #{note}, #{approvalRef}, #{decidedBy}, #{decidedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT review_case_id AS "reviewCaseId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "evidenceSetSnapshotId", snapshot_content_digest AS "snapshotContentDigest", scope_type AS "scopeType", origin AS "origin", policy_version AS "policyVersion", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", decided_at AS "decidedAt", source_review_case_id AS "sourceReviewCaseId", external_submission_ref AS "externalSubmissionRef", callback_batch_ref AS "callbackBatchRef", mapping_version_id AS "mappingVersionId", reopened_from_review_case_id AS "reopenedFromReviewCaseId", reopen_trigger_ref AS "reopenTriggerRef" FROM evd_review_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND review_case_id = CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid)

SELECT review_case_id AS "reviewCaseId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "evidenceSetSnapshotId", snapshot_content_digest AS "snapshotContentDigest", scope_type AS "scopeType", origin AS "origin", policy_version AS "policyVersion", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", decided_at AS "decidedAt", source_review_case_id AS "sourceReviewCaseId", external_submission_ref AS "externalSubmissionRef", callback_batch_ref AS "callbackBatchRef", mapping_version_id AS "mappingVersionId", reopened_from_review_case_id AS "reopenedFromReviewCaseId", reopen_trigger_ref AS "reopenTriggerRef" FROM evd_review_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC, review_case_id ASC

SELECT review_case_id::text AS "reviewCaseId", project_id::text AS "projectId", task_id::text AS "taskId" FROM evd_review_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND review_case_id = CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid)

SELECT review_case_id::text FROM evd_review_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_set_snapshot_id = CAST(#{snapshotId} AS uuid) AND origin = #{origin} AND status != 'REOPENED' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT review_decision_id AS "reviewDecisionId", review_case_id AS "reviewCaseId", decision_ordinal AS "decisionOrdinal", decision AS "decision", decision_source AS "decisionSource", reason_codes::text AS "reasonCodes", note AS "note", approval_ref AS "approvalRef", decided_by AS "decidedBy", decided_at AS "decidedAt" FROM evd_review_decision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND review_case_id = CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid) ORDER BY decision_ordinal
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(decision_ordinal), 0) FROM evd_review_decision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND review_case_id = CAST(#{reviewCaseId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_review_command_result ( tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, result_id) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{resultId} AS uuid)) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
